LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF DONALD DRUMMOND'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER IS DENIED. MR. DRUMMOND HAS NOT ESTABLISHED THE PROBABLE VALIDITY OF HIS CLAIM. MR. DRUMMOND DID NOT OBTAIN THE INFORMED WRITTEN CONSENT OF THE CLIENTS WHERE THERE WAS A POTENTIAL CONFLICT OF INTEREST. MR. RAMIREZ'S OBJECTIONS TO THE DRUMMOND DECLARATION FILED WITH THE REPLY PAPERS ARE SUSTAINED. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA, NOT REPORTED.

LAW AND MOTION 302, CROSS DEFENDANT N. PAUL ROTHMAN'S MOTION TO SET ASIDE DEFAULT/DEFAULT JUDGMENT/LEAVE TO DEFEND IS CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 6, 2013 AT 9:30 AM IN DEPT. 302 TO GIVE MOVING PARTY THE OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. MOVING PARTY MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING PAPERS TO DEPARTMENT 302, WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE, NO LATER THAN AUGUST 6, 2013 AT 4:00 PM OR THE MOTION WILL BE DENIED. ANY EXHIBIT MUST BE SEPARATED BY AN EXHIBIT TAB PER CRC 3.1110(F). THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE OPPOSITION PAPERS. JUDGE: MARLA J. LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF'S APPLICATION AND HEARING FOR RIGHT TO ATTACH ORDER. CONTINUED TO SEPTEMBER 6, 2012 TO GIVE DEFENDANT AN OPPORTUNITY TO COMPLY WITH LOCAL RULE 2.6B. DEFENDANT MUST DELIVER COURTESY COPIES OF HIS OPPOSITION PAPERS WITH A COVER LETTER STATING THE NEW HEARING DATE TO DEPARTMENT 302 NO LATER THAN 4PM AUGUST 30. THE COURT HAS COURTESY COPIES OF THE MOVING AND REPLY PAPERS. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RANDY RAMIREZ'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS AND FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS IN THE SUM OF $5,565.00: GRANTED. EVEN CONSIDERING PLAINTIFF'S PROPOSED CLAIM FOR EQUITABLE LIEN, NO REAL PROPERTY CLAIM IS STATED. (UREZ V. SUPERIOR COURT (1987) 190 CAL.APP.3D 1141, 1149 ("THE TRUE PURPOSE OF THE LIS PENDENS STATUTE IS TO PROVIDE NOTICE OF PENDING LITIGATION AND NOT TO MAKE PLAINTIFFS SECURED CREDITORS OF DEFENDANTS'").) PLAINTIFF SHALL PAY DEFENDANT REASONABLE ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COSTS IN THE AMOUNT OF $3440 (EIGHT HOURS OF AT $425 PER HOUR PLUS THE $40 FILING FEE). ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN, CLERK: LESLEY FISCELLA; COURT REPORTER: SHERRY SAWYER CSR # 5976
NOTICE OF CONT OF CMC FILED BY DEFENDANT RAMIREZ, RANDY

LAW AND MOTION 302, DEFENDANT RANDY RAMIREZ' MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE A FIRST AMENDED CROSS-COMPLAINT IS GRANTED. WHERE AN ATTORNEY VIOLATES THE CONFLICT OF INTEREST RULES, DISGORGEMENT OF PAID FEES MAY BE AN APPROPRIATE REMEDY. WHETHER CROSS-COMPLAINANT IS ENTITLED TO THAT RELIEF RAISES A FACTUAL ISSUE NOT APPROPRIATE FOR RESOLUTION ON A MOTION FOR LEAVE TO AMEND. (PREVAILING PARTY SUBMITTED A PROPOSED ORDER TO THE COURT BY EMAIL.) JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: GINA GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

Notice Of Motion For Leave To File A First Amended X-Complaint
Off Calendar Oct-23-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter.

RULING: The tentative ruling is adopted. DEFENDANT RANDY RAMIREZ' Motion For Leave To File A First Amended Cross-Complaint is Granted. Where an attorney violates the conflict of interest rules, disgorgement of paid fees may be an appropriate remedy. Whether cross-complainant is entitled to that relief raises a factual issue not appropriate for resolution on a motion for leave to amend. (Prevailing party submitted a proposed order to the court by email.) Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Plaintiff'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order
Off Calendar Sep-06-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter.
RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. Plaintiff donald drummond'S Application And Hearing For Right To Attach Order is Denied. Mr. Drummond has not established the probable validity of his claim. Mr. Drummond did not obtain the informed written consent of the clients where there was a potential conflict of interest. Mr. Ramirez's objections to the Drummond Declaration filed with the reply papers are sustained. Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.

MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS/PENDENCY OF ACTION
Off Calendar Aug-29-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: NO APPEARANCES.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. DEFENDANT RANDY RAMIREZ'S MOTION TO EXPUNGE LIS PENDENS AND FOR AN AWARD OF ATTORNEYS' FEES AND COSTS IN THE SUM OF $5,565.00: Granted. Even considering Plaintiff's proposed claim for equitable lien, no real property claim is stated. (Urez v. Superior Court (1987) 190 Cal.App.3d 1141, 1149 ("the true purpose of the lis pendens statute is to provide notice of pending litigation and not to make plaintiffs secured creditors of defendants'").) Plaintiff shall pay Defendant reasonable attorney's fees and costs in the amount of $3440 (eight hours of at $425 per hour plus the $40 filing fee). Order signed in open Court. Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella; Court Reporter: Sherry Sawyer CSR # 5976
